---
title: "Programs delivery log"
subtitle: "First deliveries closing roadmap §3.8"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
description: "Chronological log of program deliverables under UIAO_125–128. Each entry is a session record, instantiated test plan, project plan, or education walkthrough."
---

Closes roadmap **§3.8 — Programs first delivery**. The four UIAO_125–128
programs each ship one initial deliverable here so the spec → operational
loop closes once. Future deliveries land as new entries under the same
program subdirectory; this page indexes them chronologically.

## Index

| Date | Program | Spec | Title |
|---|---|---|---|
| 2026-04-26 | Training | UIAO_125 | [Adapter-author onboarding session](training/2026-04-26-adapter-author-onboarding.qmd) |
| 2026-04-26 | Test plans | UIAO_126 | [ScubaGear conformance test plan](test-plans/scubagear-conformance-test-plan.qmd) |
| 2026-04-26 | Project plans | UIAO_127 | [Acme Federal modernization project plan](project-plans/agency-acme-modernization-plan.qmd) |
| 2026-04-26 | Project plans | UIAO_127 | [HA / Performance / Recovery / Tenancy assessment (§4.4)](project-plans/2026-04-26-ha-perf-recovery-tenancy-assessment.qmd) |
| 2026-04-26 | Project plans | UIAO_127 | [UIAO_117 Phase 1 — Raw-Zone immutability + checkpoint label + manual SOP](project-plans/2026-04-26-uiao_117-phase1-recovery.qmd) |
| 2026-04-26 | Project plans | UIAO_127 | [UIAO_119 v1 — Tenancy strategy data layer](project-plans/2026-04-26-uiao_119-v1-data-layer.qmd) |
| 2026-04-26 | Project plans | UIAO_127 | [UIAO_119 v2 — Feature-flag system + reference flags + walker hygiene](project-plans/2026-04-26-uiao_119-v2-feature-flags.qmd) |
| 2026-04-26 | Project plans | UIAO_127 | [UIAO_119 — Journal + archive tenant tagging wire-up](project-plans/2026-04-26-uiao_119-journal-tagging.qmd) |
| 2026-04-26 | Project plans | UIAO_127 | [UIAO_119 — Feature-flag check-point wiring (epl.block + data-lake.immutable)](project-plans/2026-04-26-uiao_119-checkpoint-wiring.qmd) |
| 2026-04-26 | Project plans | UIAO_127 | [UIAO_119 — Auditor API tenant_id + environment filter](project-plans/2026-04-26-uiao_119-auditor-api-tenant-filter.qmd) |
| 2026-04-26 | Project plans | UIAO_127 | [UIAO_119 — Migration sandbox](project-plans/2026-04-26-uiao_119-migration-sandbox.qmd) |
| 2026-04-26 | Ops runbook | UIAO_124 | [UIAO_119 canary → regulated rollout SOP](ops-runbook/2026-04-26-uiao_119-canary-rollout.qmd) |
| 2026-04-26 | Education | UIAO_128 | [Agency onboarding walkthrough](education/agency-onboarding-walkthrough.qmd) |

## Format

Each program owns a subdirectory (`training/`, `test-plans/`,
`project-plans/`, `education/`, `ops-runbook/`) under `docs/programs/`.
Filenames embed either the date (training session records, ops
runbooks) or the subject (test plans, project plans, education
narratives) so the directory is searchable.

The format inside each file follows the program's canon spec
(UIAO_125–128). The files shipped today are the **reference shapes** —
future authors copy them and adjust.

## Maintenance

- Drop new deliveries in via PR.
- Update this page's index table to point at the new file.
- The substrate-status `UIAO_125–128` rows update from "0 deliveries"
  to "≥1 delivery" once a file lands under each subdirectory; this PR
  flips all four.
